name: 18K Yellow Gold
description: A premium alloy consisting of 75% pure gold and 25% copper/silver to provide excellent durability and a warm, classic yellow lustre.
care_instructions: Clean with warm soapy water and a soft lint-free cloth. Store in a fabric-lined box. Keep away from household chemicals like bleach and chlorine.

name: 925 Sterling Silver
description: A beautiful bright silver alloy containing 92.5% silver and 7.5% copper. Offers a brilliant polished finish ideal for traditional designs.
care_instructions: Store in airtight containers to prevent tarnish. Use a specialized silver polishing cloth to remove tarnish, and keep it completely dry.

name: 950 Platinum
description: An extremely rare, dense, and naturally white noble metal containing 95% pure platinum. It is naturally hypoallergenic and retains its color forever.
care_instructions: Wash with warm water and mild dish soap. Use a soft brush for crevices. Requires professional polishing to restore its high-shine finish if patina develops.
